plugins.name: Web Search
plugins.description: Searches the internet using DuckDuckGo and brings summaries of texts for AI to read.
plugins.description_pt: Pesquisa na internet usando DuckDuckGo e traz o resumo dos textos para a IA ler.
plugins.author: LIA Team

tool.name: web_search
tool.description: Searches the internet using DuckDuckGo and brings summaries of texts for AI to read.
tool.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"SHORT AND SIMPLE search term, max 3 words (e.g., 'IFSul Pelotas news')."}},"required":["query"]}

plugins.name: YouTube Player
plugins.description: Plays a specific song or video on YouTube.
plugins.description_pt: Toca uma música ou vídeo específico no YouTube.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: youtube_player
tool.description: Plays a specific song or video on YouTube.
tool.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the song or video to search for."}},"required":["query"]}

plugins.name: Adjust Mood
plugins.description: Allows AI to change her own mood or emotional state based on the conversation.
plugins.description_pt: Permite que a IA mude seu próprio humor ou estado emocional baseado na conversa.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: adjust_mood
tool.description: Allows AI to change her own mood or emotional state based on the conversation.

plugins.name: Test Code
plugins.description: Reads the last code saved in the database and executes it in the terminal to validate errors.
plugins.description_pt: Lê o último código salvo no banco de dados e executa no terminal para validar erros.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: test_code
tool.description: Reads the last code saved in the database and executes it in the terminal to validate errors.

plugins.name: Save Code
plugins.description: Silently saves a generated block of code to the user's Desktop.
plugins.description_pt: Salva silenciosamente um bloco de código gerado no Desktop do usuário.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: save_code
tool.description: Silently saves a generated block of code to the user's Desktop.
tool.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"language":{"type":"string","description":"Programming language (e.g., python, js, smali)."},"code":{"type":"string","description":"The raw source code to save."}},"required":["language","code"]}

plugins.name: Direct Search
plugins.description: Opens a URL or Google search DIRECTLY in the physical browser for the user to see.
plugins.description_pt: Abre uma URL ou pesquisa no Google DIRETAMENTE no navegador físico para o usuário ver.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: direct_search
tool.description: Opens a URL or Google search DIRECTLY in the physical browser for the user to see.

plugins.name: Open App
plugins.description: Opens programs and files on the local computer.
plugins.description_pt: Abre programas e arquivos no computador local.
plugins.author: Robert Souza

tool.name: open_app
tool.description: Opens programs and files on the local computer.
tool.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"app_name":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the application (e.g., vscode, notepad, calculator, cmd, browser)."}},"required":["app_name"]}

masters.name: Typing Control
masters.description: Master for text input control. Activate this to control typing, deleting, copying, pasting and text navigation.
masters.description_pt: Master de controle de texto. Ative para controlar digitação, deleção, cópia, cola e navegação de texto.
masters.author: Robert Souza

type_text.description: Type text at the current cursor position. Use this when the user wants to write something.

delete_chars.description: Delete characters by pressing backspace. Use when user wants to delete text backwards.

delete_forward.description: Delete characters forward (Delete key). Use when user wants to delete text in front of cursor.

delete_line.description: Delete entire current line (select line and delete).

new_line.description: Press Enter to create a new line.

move_cursor.schema_json: {"type": "object", "properties": {"direction": {"type": "string", "enum": ["left", "right", "up", "down"], "description": "Direction to move cursor"}, "count": {"type": "integer", "description": "Number of times to move (default 1)"}}, "required": ["direction"]}

go_to_start.description: Move cursor to start of line (Home key).

go_to_end.description: Move cursor to end of line (End key).

new_line_and_type.description: Create a new line THEN type text.

masters.name: Browser Control
masters.description: Master for intelligent browser automation using Firefox. Automatically launches browser on first use and allows clicking by semantic description. Use this master for any interactive web task.
masters.description_pt: Master para automação inteligente de navegador usando Firefox. Abre o navegador automaticamente no primeiro uso e permite clicar por descrição semântica. Use este mestre para qualquer tarefa interativa na web.
masters.author: Robert Souza

browser_navigate.description: Primary tool for navigating to URLs within the controlled browser. Launches Firefox automatically if not running. Use this when you need to open a website and then interact with it (click, type, scroll).

browser_snapshot.description: Get a list of all clickable elements on the current page, with their visible text and CSS selectors. Use this to decide what to click or interact with next.

browser_click.description: Click on an element by its exact visible text or a CSS selector. Prefer using 'text' based on what you see in the snapshot.
browser_click.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"text":{"type":"string","description":"Exact visible text of the element to click"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS selector (alternative)"}},"required":[]}

browser_type.description: Type text into an input field identified by its label, placeholder, or CSS selector. Optionally press Enter after typing.
browser_type.schema_json: {"type":"object","properties":{"label":{"type":"string","description":"Label text or placeholder of the field"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS selector (alternative)"},"text":{"type":"string","description":"Text to type"},"press_enter":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},"required":["text"]}

browser_scroll.description: Scroll the page up or down by a specified amount.

browser_go_back.description: Go back to the previous page.

browser_go_forward.description: Go forward to the next page.

browser_get_text.description: Extract all visible text from the page or from a specific element.

browser_screenshot.description: Take a screenshot of the current page and save to a file.

browser_close.description: Close the browser and clean up resources.
